summary: Iteration 3 — comprehensive testing of the three new UI feature bundles (Income Tax Deductions/Exemptions/Perquisites catalog, Investments Lumpsum Advisor + Signal Cards, Cost Audit 4-phase gated wizard). All 14 review-checklist items PASS on the frontend. Backend re-verified: 15/17 pytest pass — only the two /api/ai/suggest tests fail with 'litellm.AuthenticationError: Invalid API key' (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY quota/key regression since iteration_2, unrelated to this iteration's changes). Review request explicitly says NOT to click AI diagnostic in this run, so this does not affect the three new-feature flows.

minor.issue: Both anthropic and openai providers return 500 with 'litellm.AuthenticationError: OpenAIException - Invalid API key'. This worked in iteration_2 — likely EMERGENT_LLM_KEY was rotated / quota exhausted / mis-mapped. Not exercised in this iteration's new-feature flows but blocks AiPanel 'Run AI' buttons app-wide.

issues: Pre-existing hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — carried over from iteration_2. Cosmetic; does not affect functionality.

action_items: (HIGH) Investigate EMERGENT_LLM_KEY / litellm 'Invalid API key' — /api/ai/suggest now returns 500 for both anthropic + openai. Iteration_2 had this WORKING; something regressed the key / provider mapping.
(LOW, carried over) Fix pre-existing <span> inside <option> hydration warning in IncomeTax fy-select (render option children as plain string, or use Radix Select instead of native <select>).
critical_code_review_comments: DeductionsCatalog.js: applicability heuristics are clean; regimeBlocked correctly exempts 80CCD(2) so it does not get hidden under New Regime. Verified 13 'New Regime blocks' pills appear on old-only DEDUCTIONS when regime=new.

DeductionsCatalog onAdd contract in IncomeTax.js correctly (a) switches to Old regime and (b) increments ded[code] by suggestedValue = DEDUCTION_CAPS[code]. Add button disappears after click (tone → claimed) — verified by add-80DD click count going from 1 → 0.

LumpsumAdvisor.js: all 6 buckets render with 20/15/25/20/15/5 (moderate) allocation summing to 100. Amount and risk changes both recompute bucket-land ₹ value — verified ₹10,00,000 → ₹20,00,000 (moderate 10M) → ₹25,00,000 (aggressive 10M).

signals.js: deterministic BUY/SELL/HOLD with target and stop-loss computed off seriesFor(); SignalCard renders correctly under stocks chart and Portfolio table shows data-testid=sig-<SYMBOL> badge (verified HDFCBANK → HOLD).

CostAudit.js: strict phase gating implemented via canAdvance(). Phase 1 verdict renders live from computeEligibility(). Phase 2 gate = uploadedCount === 3 (verified 1/3 disabled, 2/3 disabled, 3/3 enabled). Phase 3 gate = flags !== null (verified before-click count=0, after-click 5 rows, p3-next enabled). Phase 4 draft-preview contains all 4 PHASE sections + XBRL, and download-draft fires a real page.expect_download event (filename Cost-Audit-Draft-<CIN>.txt).
Phase 3 AI review has ~900ms setTimeout — deterministic; no network call — matches spec.
Draft report is memoised on 20 dependencies (line 164) — reasonable and does not include _id or PII beyond user-entered CIN.

OPTIONAL: Investments.js is 400+ lines and CostAudit.js is ~390 lines — approaching the >700-line split threshold; still fine but SignalCard / Kpi / SliderRow / VarCell could be extracted for future re-use.

success_rate.backend: 88% (15/17 pytest; only AI-key tests fail — unrelated to this iteration)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 14 review checklist items PASS — login→overview, deductions-catalog 3 sections, New-Regime-blocks pills, Already-claimed pill, add-80DD/add-80TTA increment field, lumpsum-advisor with 6 buckets, amount+risk recompute, signal-card under stocks chart, sig-<SYMBOL> badge in Portfolio, phase-1 verdict + p1-next, phase-2 3-upload gating + comparator recompute, phase-3 AI review 5-row flags + p3-next gating, phase-4 draft-preview + download-draft file download event)

test_credentials: demo@myfinancebook.in / Demo@123 ; ca@myfinancebook.in / CA@123456 (both verified working).
seed_data_creation: Portfolio test added HDFCBANK qty=7 avg=1650 to demo account and persisted via /api/portfolio/save — safe (isolated to demo user).
context_for_next_testing_agent: The three new UI feature bundles are all working correctly. Only outstanding backend regression is /api/ai/suggest returning 500 'Invalid API key' (was working in iteration_2). If the AI panel is needed in a future iteration, verify EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env and restart backend. Base URL: https://finance-book-hub.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend tests: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/test_backend.py -v`.
rca of the issue: AI endpoint failure RCA: /api/ai/suggest → emergentintegrations → litellm underlying call returns 'OpenAIException - Invalid API key'. This is a config-level regression (key rotated/expired/quota) not a code regression — server.py has not changed since iteration_2. Mitigation: rotate EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in backend/.env, `sudo supervisorctl restart backend`, then re-run TestAI class. Note: the same error text mentioning 'OpenAI' also appears for the anthropic provider — this is expected because emergentintegrations routes both providers through litellm using the same universal EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.
